case_title: MONICA CORBIN VS. GAIL MOTONARI et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST MONICA CORBIN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-20-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-05-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-26-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-11-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORBIN, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT MOTONARI, GAIL DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-11-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-27-2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-26-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-20-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CORBIN, MONICA
